name: InsightPolicyCatalogue
description: Closed code-owned catalogue of active and deferred analytical policy versions and deterministic ordering.
schema_def: PolicyDescriptor {kind, version, status: Active|Deferred, schemaFingerprint, policyFingerprint, default, order, supportedWindows[], limitSetVersion}.
Active v1 policy kinds: AnalysisWindowPolicy, ExactMetricPolicy, LinearPacePolicy, EvidenceSufficiencyPolicy, ExplanationPolicy, OrderingPolicy.
Deferred v1 kinds: ForecastPolicy, TrendPolicy, AnomalyPolicy, AttentionPolicy; no executable formula, baseline, threshold, severity, or activation surface.
Every active descriptor names deterministic formula/rule identity, evidence requirements, explicit unavailable states, limitations, and compatibility range.
Catalogue is source-generated and immutable per build; owner-authored scripts, formulas, expressions, plugins, and CRUD are absent.
